contaminants.name: silicone grease
contaminants.note: From joints, septa. Persistent broad singlet.

contaminants.name: ethyl acetate
contaminants.note: Common column chromatography solvent. Characteristic quartet at 4.12.

contaminants.name: dichloromethane (DCM)
contaminants.note: Very common. Hard to remove fully under vacuum.

contaminants.name: dimethylformamide (DMF)
contaminants.note: High-boiling. Very hard to remove. Two N-methyl singlets.

contaminants.name: dimethyl sulfoxide (DMSO)
contaminants.note: Very high boiling. Not to be confused with DMSO-d6 solvent residual.

contaminants.name: BHT (butylated hydroxytoluene)
contaminants.note: Stabilizer in THF/ether/DCM. Distinctive aromatic + OH + methyl pattern.

contaminants.name: diethyl ether
contaminants.note: Very low boiling. Usually removed easily.

contaminants.name: methanol
contaminants.note: Singlet CH3 + broad OH. Hard to fully remove from polar compounds.

contaminants.name: acetic acid
contaminants.note: From workup with AcOH or AcOEt hydrolysis.

contaminants.name: TMS (tetramethylsilane)
contaminants.note: Reference compound or residual from NMR tube cap/septum.
